summary: Technical Architect designing and building scalable digital governance and healthcare platforms for urban local bodies and state governments across India and Africa.
highlights: Led architecture and development of HCM Console (Oct 2023) — a health campaign management system for African field operations, enabling configuration of campaign workflows and real-time monitoring.
Designed DIGIT Workbench (Jul-Oct 2023) — centralized configuration management using JSON Schema Draft 7 for dynamic UI generation across DIGIT modules.
Architected MUKTA/Digit Works (Jul 2022-Sep 2023) — employment scheme delivery platform for urban workers in Odisha, managing wage payments and work orders.
Built CARE DICOM Enabler (Windows .NET service using fo-dicom 5.0.2) bridging hospital imaging modalities to CARE HMIS, integrated DCM4CHEE PACS and OHIF Viewer for tele-radiology.
Delivered eAushadhi pharmacy integration with Karnataka's government API, including composite-key data model, per-facility-date sync, and trigram-based fuzzy drug-name matching.
Migrated care-ecosystem repositories to multi-architecture (amd64/arm64) Docker builds, set up k3s cluster with Superset analytics using Helm and ArgoCD GitOps delivery.

summary: Full-stack engineer contributing to the DIGIT Urban platform used across 450+ urban local bodies in India for citizen services and municipal governance.
highlights: Built and maintained DIGIT UI modules: digit-ui-css, digit-ui-module-core, digit-ui-module-common (payments), digit-ui-module-dss.
Contributed the Public Grievance Redressal (PGR) module ported from DIGIT OSS Urban.
Delivered UI for the HCM Admin Console and microplan resource-management workflows.
Built CARE plugin CLI scaffold generator to accelerate development for care_fe federation architecture.
